description: A configuration error was found in station GE.GSI: the instrument gain was recorded incorrectly. A corrected inventory file is available at /home/ga/Documents/GSI_corrected.scml. Because of this error, our current magnitude estimate for the Noto earthquake is overestimated. Update the SeisComP database (mysql://sysop:sysop@localhost/seiscomp) with the corrected inventory and recompute the amplitudes and magnitudes for the Noto earthquake using the waveform archive at /home/ga/seiscomp/var/lib/archive. Ensure the corrected magnitude is stored in the database.
